case_title: ALLEN GEE VS. SUSANNA YIP et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-05-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $4,231.20 ON MAY 28, 2014 FOR DISMISSAL", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
